title: Tom Hall
text:
Faculty directory observation
Name: Tom Hall
Snapshot: 2026-07-21
biography: Dr. Hall has 30 years of experience in the private sector, public sector, and the educational sector, both in the US and abroad. He has won numerous grants, published many papers in top journals (including http://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0929119911001301 ), has made dozens of academic and practitioner presentations, and also has an active consulting practice.
education_entries: Ph D in Economic Policy, University of Southern California
MA in International Economics, The Johns Hopkins University
BA in Political Science, The Johns Hopkins University
research_interests: International finance, nonprofit evaluation and economic impact studies, venture capital and private equity, capital structure, emerging markets, high-tech firm financing
teaching_interests: Corporate finance, banking institutions, business analytics

Presentations: Thomas Hall, VPCC special meeting re: small business study, "Expansion or Stagnation? A Survey-Based Analysis of Peninsula Small Businesses," Hampton. (2018)
